body_plan.core_shape: flat rectangular slab, wider at top than bottom, tapering slightly like a trapezoid
body_plan.symmetry: bilateral (inner wobbly-bordered rectangle centered within outer rectangle)

parts.shape: large flat trapezoidal slab with straight thick black outline
wobbly, jagged-edged rectangle drawn just inside the outer border
parts.placement: centered inside outer shell, like a raised rim or seam
arranged in two vertical columns of three, evenly spaced down the center of the body, inside the inner ridge

distinctive_features: flat, thin, cracker-like slab body with no visible head, limbs, or tail
a jagged wobbly-lined inner border running parallel to the straight outer edge, like a seam or dried skin fold
six small dark dots arranged in two neat columns down the middle, resembling docking holes or pore markings
no legs, eyes, or face are drawn — body reads as a flat, faceless, immobile plate creature
locomotion: none visible; presumed to lie flat and immobile, possibly sliding or drifting along flat surfaces like a paper-thin creature
vibe: a flat, faceless cracker-shaped slab creature with a wobbly inner seam and six mysterious dots down its middle
